headline: Cigna Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Evernorth Unit
summary: CI beats Q1 EPS estimates as Evernorth revenues jump 9% despite rising pharmacy costs; 2026 EPS outlook lifted to at least $30.35.

headline: Parsley Health Becomes the First Functional Medicine Provider to Accept Insurance Nationwide
summary: NEW YORK, April 30, 2026--Parsley Health, the first company that brought functional medicine to a national audience, is now the first to bring it into the mainstream insurance system. Starting today, its physician-led, root cause care is available nationwide through in-network insurance, expanding access to 150 million Americans through the coverage they already have.

headline: CVS Earnings Are Coming. Why the Stock Is No Longer a Value Trap.
